vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.description: Structural integrity for wing spar attachment

verify.value: All required elements are present in the blueprint.
verify.rule: All elements must be present and correctly formatted.
The mass estimate must be within acceptable limits.

verify.value: All required features are mapped to geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each required feature must have corresponding geometry operations.

verify.value: All interfaces are defined with clear mating geometry and DOF.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be clearly defined with mating geometry and DOF.

verify.value: Bolt circle is present but locking method and preload intent are not specified.
verify.rule: Critical joints must state locking method and preload intent.

risk.desc: Insufficient locking method specified for bolt circle.
risk.mit: Specify locking method and preload intent for bolt circle.

risk.desc: Cooling airflow may be obstructed if not properly designed.
risk.mit: Conduct flow test to ensure cooling inlet design is adequate.

risk.desc: Visual inspection may not be sufficient for all features.
risk.mit: Consider additional inspection methods for critical features.

risk.desc: Threaded connections may not have adequate engagement depth.
risk.mit: Ensure all threaded connections use inserts or bosses with sufficient engagement depth.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect part quality and fit.
risk.mit: Review manufacturing process and adjust as needed to ensure quality and fit.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)

requirements: Structural integrity for load path continuity

verify.value: All required features and geometry operations are present.
verify.rule: All required evidence_features must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All features are traceable from part_tree to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of anti-rotation key due to complex geometry.
risk.mit: Implement additional visual inspection steps during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion affecting load path continuity.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints and allowances in design.

risk.desc: Battery access cut may be obstructed by nearby features.
risk.mit: Review and adjust geometry to ensure clear access.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.path_description: Lift load path from wing skin to fuselage frames via spar, ribs, and carry-through
Heat dissipation from spar and ribs to ambient air
Battery service access via slide rail and CG marks

internal_feature_targets.description: Load path continuation to fuselage frames

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures orientated for easy removal, oriented towards datum faces
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, tactile inspection for critical interfaces

verification_focus.description: Verify continuous load path from spar to fuselage frames
verification_focus.inspection: Stress analysis, load transfer fittings inspection

verification_focus.description: Ensure anti-rotation key remains visible and inspectable
verification_focus.inspection: Visual inspection of key location and alignment

verification_focus.description: Verify battery access cut is clear and usable
verification_focus.inspection: Physical access test, visual inspection of cut

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure cable harnesses are routed through visible raceways.
Add strain relief geometry and respect minimum bend radius.

Mount PCBs on standoffs with clearance and connector orientation logic.
